---
title: "Wetland Complexes - vegetation"
author: "Dana Lanceman"
date: "09/07/2021"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r Set up}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)

vege_prop_5 <- read_excel("raw/Wetland_vege_components_summaries.xlsx", sheet = "Major_>5%")

vege_prop_1 <- read_excel("raw/Wetland_vege_components_summaries.xlsx", sheet = "Major_>1%")

vege_all <- read_excel("raw/Wetland_vege_components_summaries.xlsx", sheet = "All")
```

```{r Stacked bar plots}

# reorder ANAE_TYPE for vege_prop_5
vege_prop_5$ANAE_TYPE <- factor(vege_prop_5$ANAE_TYPE,levels = c( 
  "Other",
  "Pp4.2: Permanent wetland",
  "Pt1.1.1: River red gum riparian zone or floodplain",
  "Pt1.2.1: Black box riparian zone or floodplain",
  "Pt1.3.1: Coolibah riparian zone or floodplain",
  "Pt1.6.2: Temporary woodland swamp",
  "Pt1.7.1: Lignum riparian zone or floodplain", 
  "Pt1.8.1: Riparian or floodplain shrubland",
  "Pt1.8.2: Temporary shrub swamp",  
  "Pt2.2.2: Temporary sedge/grass/forb marsh",
  "Pp2.1.2: Permanent tall emergent marsh",
  "Pt2.3.2: Freshwater meadow",
  "Pt4.1: Floodplain or riparian wetland",
  "Rp1.4: Permanent lowland stream",  
  "Lp1.1: Permanent lake",                             
  "Lt1.1: Temporary lake"))

ggplot(tips2, aes(x = day, y = perc)) + geom_bar(stat = "identity")

ggplot(vege_prop_5, aes(fill=ANAE_TYPE, y=proportion, x=Wetland)) + 
    geom_bar(position="stack", stat="identity") +
  coord_flip() # make horizontal

ggplot(vege_prop_5, aes(fill=ANAE_TYPE, y=area.ha, x=Wetland)) + 
    geom_bar(position="stack", stat="identity") +
  coord_flip() # make horizontal

# too busy
#ggplot(vege_prop_1, aes(fill=ANAE_TYPE, y=proportion, x=Wetland)) +
#    geom_bar(position="stack", stat="identity") +
#  coord_flip()

ggplot(vege_all, aes(fill=ANAE_TYPE, y=area.ha, x=Wetland)) + 
    geom_bar(position = "stack", stat="identity") +
  coord_flip() # make horizontal
```
